name: Fuhajin
description: Perform an upwards kick while capturing ki from your immediate surroundings. Increases your Fuha stock by 1 upon completion.

name: Saihasho
description: (Can be followed up with an Ankensatsu or Go Ohsatsu when a Fuha is stocked)A roundhouse kick that fires a projectile low to the ground. Useful for checking your opponents, in combos, or as a way to start offensive pressure.

name: Ankensatsu
description: (Can be followed up with a Saihasho or Go Ohsatsu when a Fuha is stocked)Leap forward in a low arc and come down with an axe kick. Useful as a way to approach while avoiding attacks targeted at your feet, and can also be used in combos.

name: Go Ohsatsu
description: (Can be followed up with a Saihasho or Ankensatsu when a Fuha is stocked)Lunge forward and let fly a swift overhead roundhouse. Its long reach makes it effective when used for surprise attacks from a distance, and it can also be canceled into from normal moves to make combos.

name: Tensenrin
description: Rotate like a windmill while unleashing a series of kicks. Can be used in a variety of situations to deal big damage.

name: Shiku-sen
description: (During a forward jump)A surprise attack performed by kicking while airborne. Useful for surprise attacks or as a way to approach your opponent.

name: Shiren-sen
description: (After Shiku-sen)A series of kicks performed from Shiku-sen that tack on additional damage and knock the opponent down.

name: Sakkai Fuhazan
description: (Hold the button with a Fuha stocked to change effect)Fire multiple ki blasts with a kick and follow it up with another giant ki blast to knock an opponent away. Easy to work into aerial combos against opponents who have been launched into the air.

name: Feng Shui Engine
description: (Hold button to dash)Power up your abilities by unleashing the power of the Feng Shui Engine embedded in your eye. Once powered up, you will be able to cancel normal moves into other normal moves or even unique attacks.

name: Kaisen Dankai Raku
description: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)Unleash the full power of the Feng Shui Engine to perform a powerful sequence of attacks. Useful when trying to tack on big damage during combos or when turning the tables on your opponent.

name: Kyosesho
description: A forward-moving attack that can be canceled into special moves.

name: Senkai Kick
description: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching.

name: Renko Kicks
description: A two-hit sequence of kicks that can be canceled into special moves.

name: Korenzan
description: A multi-hit kick that can be canceled into special moves.

name: Death Crest
description: A series of attacks, the third of which can be canceled into Super Arts.

name: Spider Fang Throw
description: (When near opponent)Grab your opponent's head with your foot to make them hunch over, and send them flying with two kicks. Throws your opponent without switching places with them.

name: Shadow Kick Throw
description: (When near opponent)Use one foot to knock your opponent down, and follow up by stepping on their back. Throws your opponent while switching places with them.

name: Zanka-sen
description: (During a jump) (When near opponent)Latch onto an airborne opponent's back and kick them to the ground behind you. Throws your opponent while switching places with them.

name: Drive Impact: Sekkan Kick
description: Lunge forward with a powerful attack. Can be used to absorb an opponent's attack while launching your own offensive.

name: Drive Reversal: Kaita Raid
description: (When blocking, recovering from a knockdown, or during a successful Drive Parry)Can be used after blocking an attack to quickly turn a defensive position into an offensive one. Can also be used when recovering from a knockdown. The input can be held while downed to perform this when rising.

name: Drive Parry
description: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)Adopt a stance that allows you to deflect all opponent strikes. This stance can be sustained by holding down the command used to activate it.

name: Parry Drive Rush
description: (During a Drive Parry)Immediately move forward from a Drive Parry stance. Normal or unique attacks performed while moving will have their properties changed.

name: Cancel Drive Rush
description: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)Lunge forward with a powerful attack. Can be used to absorb an opponent's attack while launching your own offensive.
